Wade buys three sandwiches and two drinks. The drinks cost $4 each, so the total cost for drinks is 2 * $4 = $8. Since Wade spends a total of $26, the remaining amount spent on sandwiches is $26 - $8 = $18. He buys three sandwiches, so the cost per sandwich is $18 / 3 = $6. [cost of one sandwich] is $6. [total spent on drinks] is $8. [total spent on sandwiches] is $18. [total amount spent] is $26.
